principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix iMessage clarity with sci-fi HUD aesthetics.
Emotion First: Every interaction feels like magic.
Negative Space: Value the empty areas.
Glassmorphism: Use optical clarity, not just blur.

structure: Sandbox Footer (Fixed Bottom Layer 0): Debug info

Header.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-[#1e1b4b]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

elements.Subtitle: text-[10px] text-white/50 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] ml-2
elements.PetBadge: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white/10 rounded-full border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/20 transition-all cursor-pointer

ChatBubble_Mira.classes: relative bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm text-white/90 p-4 shadow-lg max-w-[85%] md:max-w-[70%]
ChatBubble_Mira.highlight: border-l-4 border-amber-500 pl-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500/10 to-transparent

ChatBubble_User.classes: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#A855F7] to-[#EC4899] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 shadow-purple-glow max-w-[85%] ml-auto font-medium

ThinDock.classes: flex items-center justify-center gap-2 p-2 bg-[#0f172a]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full mx-auto mb-2 w-fit max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide
ThinDock.item_classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 min-w-[60px] rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 transition-all group
ThinDock.icon_classes: w-5 h-5 mb-1 text-white/70 group-hover:text-white group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

Composer.classes: w-full bg-[#1e1b4b]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 p-4 pb-8
Composer.input_classes: w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500/50 transition-all
Composer.button_classes: p-3 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 to-purple-600 text-white shadow-lg hover:shadow-purple-glow transition-all active:scale-95

ProductCard.classes: min-w-[160px] w-[160px] bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg border border-white/10 flex flex-col snap-center
ProductCard.add_btn_classes: mt-auto w-full py-1.5 text-xs font-bold text-white bg-gray-900 rounded-lg hover:bg-black transition-colors

TestScenarios.classes: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2 p-4 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 mt-4
TestScenarios.chip_classes: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-all text-sm text-white/80

universal_guidelines: Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Syne' class 'font-special'.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
instructions_to_main_agent: Rewrite /app/frontend/src/pages/MiraDemoPage.jsx to implement this premium design. You MUST Replace the existing CSS in /app/frontend/src/styles/mira-chat.css with the new Tailwind-based styles or updated CSS variables. However, since the user asked to 'Transform' and 'match reference', it is safer to rewrite the CSS to match the new guideline variables and classes, or better yet, use inline Tailwind classes in the JSX for structure and only use CSS for complex animations/glass effects. The provided JSON defines the specific look. Focus on the 'Dock' and 'Chat Bubbles' distinctiveness.
